title: alyssum wulfenianum subsp. wulfenianum
intro: Alyssum wulfenianum subsp. wulfenianum, also known as Wulfen's alyssum or mountain alyssum, is a perennial plant that belongs to the family Brassicaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant properties, making it effective in treating respiratory issues and wounds. The health benefits of Wulfen's alyssum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate coughs, and soothe sore throats, making it a valuable herb in treating various health conditions. In herbal preparations, Wulfen's alyssum can be found in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
